failedAssertions.reason: OpenRouter rate limit (50 req/day) prevents plan generation testing
Blocked by VAL-PLAN-001 - no plan generated to verify unit totals
Second plan in same session does not auto-save. Only first plan persists to dashboard.
Blocked by VAL-PLAN-001 - no plan generated to verify prerequisites
OpenRouter rate limit (50 req/day) exhausted - cannot test recovery persistence
Blocked by VAL-PLAN-007 - multiple plans management requires second plan persistence

frictions.description: OpenRouter free tier rate limit (20 req/min, 50 req/day) severely restricts testing. Multiple assertion attempts exhaust quota quickly.
Second plan persistence issue - auto-save works for first plan but subsequent plans in same session don't persist. May be timing issue or race condition.

blockers.description: OpenRouter API rate limit exhausted. The free tier 50 req/day limit was hit during testing, preventing plan generation assertions from being fully verified.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Waited between requests, still hit daily quota. Need to test with API credits or mock server.

blockers.description: Second plan auto-save not working. First plan in a session auto-saves correctly and appears on dashboard. Creating a second plan via chat in same session does not persist.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Created multiple plans, waited 20+ seconds after AI response, only first plan appeared on dashboard.

notes: Round 4 validation completed with mixed results. Core plan persistence (VAL-PLAN-003, VAL-PLAN-004, VAL-PLAN-005, VAL-PLAN-010) and first-visit journey (VAL-CROSS-001, VAL-CROSS-005) now pass. However, 6 assertions still fail: 4 blocked by OpenRouter rate limits, 2 blocked by second-plan persistence issue. Fixes made in commits edf5a31 (seed data) and 37b5719 (plan persistence) improved results significantly from Round 3 (12/22 passed vs 18/26 passed now).
